docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY TOM, KORENE PACHECO, JENNIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOM, KORENE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACHECO, JENNIE $2,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $900.00 INTEREST, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,835.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK: MARJORIE SCHWARTZ-SCOTT, NOT REPORTED (506) APPEARANCE BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCES.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-25-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-25-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACHECO, JENNIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-18-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT, DEFENDANT'S HUSBAND AND SON APPEAR ON HER BEHALF, BOTH STATE DEFENDANT IS IN FRESNO TAKING CARE OF A FAMILY MEMBER. DEFENDANTS DO NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PATRICK STREB. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $253.00 ACCRUED INTEREST, $472.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, JENNIE

ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING BY THE DEFENDANT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF TOM, KORENE

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS. HEARING SET FOR JUN-25-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
*****AMENDED ORDER***** COURT'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS. FILED BY KORENE TOM IS GRANTED. MOTION FOR ALLOWANCE OF NON-STATUTORY COSTS GRANTED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TOM, KORENE AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, JENNIE
